scripts.build: vite build && vite build --ssr src/App.svelte --outDir .ssr && node scripts/prerender.mjs
scripts.build:landing: LANDING=true vite build && cp dist/welcome.html dist/index.html && mkdir -p dist/welcome && cp dist/welcome.html dist/welcome/index.html
scripts.deploy: npm run build && cp CNAME dist/CNAME && gh-pages -d dist --nojekyll
